race.comment: OUR LADY PEACE (13) at her top for this and due for a change of luck at start six. Sat on the good speed on the back-up with a fighting third over 1000m at this track. No excuses today. Go close. ASK DI (10) unwanted in betting on debut ($20), when she covered a stack of ground early to finish a close-up sixth over 1100m at Wyong in a Super Maiden. Tricky gate again in a weaker contest. Top-three contender. TOUCHING HANS (8) three-year-old Hanseatic gelding from Touch Of Mink on debut for the Matthew Smith yard. All three trials have been sound and he should get through the going. TERRA LUMINA (7) shouldered the 59kg first-up for a respectable fourth over 1000m at Canberra. Has further upside and the cross-over nose band goes on. Expected to take a hand in the finish.
